briefdescription.para: DPRX subsystem DP interrupt ID for ARM platforms.
Interrupt controller type for ARM platforms.
Interrupt controller device ID for ARM platforms.
Interrupt controller handler for ARM platforms.
DP RX Subsystem device ID.
Video PHY Controller device ID.
Timer Counter device ID.
Video Frame CRC base address.
UART Lite base address.
Video PHY Controller base address.
Video EDID base address.
IIC base address for SDT builds.
Default DP RX link rate configuration.
Default DP RX lane count configuration.
DP blank screen idle timeout value.
Vertical blank wait count.
AUX defer count for compliance/interop.
Video PHY RX symbol error counter for channels 1 and 2 register offset.
Video PHY RX symbol error counter for channels 3 and 4 register offset.
Video PHY DRP CPLL feedback divider register address.
Video PHY DRP CPLL reference clock divider register address.
Video PHY DRP RX output divider register address.
Video PHY DRP RX clock 25 register address.
Video PHY DRP TX clock 25 register address.
Video PHY DRP TX output divider register address.
Video PHY DRP RX data width register address.
Video PHY DRP RX internal data width register address.
Video PHY DRP GTHE4 PRBS error counter lower register address.
Video PHY DRP GTHE4 PRBS error counter upper register address.
Polarity mask for lane polarity configuration.
Timer reset value in microseconds.
Video PHY DP link rate for 10.0 Gbps.
Video PHY DP link rate for 13.5 Gbps.
Video PHY DP link rate for 20.0 Gbps.
Video PHY DP reference clock frequency for 400 MHz.
PS IIC clock frequency in Hz.
< VCU118 (270Mhz on REFCLK0, 400Mhz on REFCLK1)
The DPRX Subsystem instance.
The interrupt controller instance.
The DPRX Subsystem instance.
Timer instance.
Video Frame CRC instance.
I2C bus for MC6000.

detaileddescription.para: I2C bus for MC6000 and IDT.

briefdescription.para: This function is the main entry point for the design example using the XDpRxSs driver.

detaileddescription.para: This function will setup the system with interrupts handlers.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique device ID of the DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the system setup failed.
XST_SUCCESS should never return since this function, if setup was successful, is blocking.

simplesect.para: If system setup was successful, this function is blocking in order to illustrate interrupt handling taking place for different types interrupts. Refer xdprxss.h file for more info.

briefdescription.para: This function initialize required platform specific peripherals.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if required peripherals are initialized and configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function configures Video Phy.

parameterdescription.para: is the Video PHY device ID or base address.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Video Phy configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function sets proper ref clk frequency and line rate.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the Video PHY instance.
is the link rate to be configured.

briefdescription.para: This function prints Menu.
This function reports CRC values of Video components.
This function Calculates CRC values of Video components.
This function is a non-blocking UART return byte.
This function is called when DisplayPort Subsystem core requires delay or sleep.

detaileddescription.para: It provides timer with predefined amount of loop iterations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.
is the delay time in microseconds.

briefdescription.para: This function to get uart input from user.
This function sets up the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the DisplayPort RX Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The DPRX Subsystem core could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the power state interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a no video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a vertical blank interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a training lost interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when a valid video interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Generic Packet Handling of 32-Bytes payload.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the training done interrupt occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the unplug event occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for when the link bandwidth change occurs.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for PLL reset request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for PLL reset request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Access lane set request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Access link qual request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Access prbs error count.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the callback function for Test CRC Event request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function handles MST Down Request interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function handles MST Down Reply interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function handles MST payload allocation interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function handles MST ACT (Allocation Change Trigger) interrupt.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpRxSs instance.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes VFMC.
This function is the callback function for Info Packet Handling.
This function is the callback function for Ext Packet Handling.
This function enables instruction and data caches.
This function disables instruction and data caches.
This is the main function for XDpRxSs interrupt example.

detaileddescription.para: If the DpRxSs_Main function which setup the system succeeds, this function will wait for the interrupts.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful, XST_FAILURE if unsuccessful.
Unless setup failed, main will never return since DpRxSs_Main is blocking (it is waiting on interrupts).

briefdescription.para: This function prints the DisplayPort link information.
This function sets user callback handlers for DP RX Subsystem events.
This function scans VFMC- IIC.

parameterdescription.para: is the IIC base address.

briefdescription.para: This file contains a design example using the XDpRxSs driver in single stream (SST) transport mode.

detaileddescription.para: This example application is designed to run on the ZynqMP evaluation board (ZCU102) and the MicroBlaze evaluation board (VCU118).

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 ND 10/18/22 Common DP 2.1 rx only application for zcu102 and vcu118 1.01 ND 03/24/25 Added support for PARRETO fmc. 1.02 ND 05/02/25 Enhanced the prints for training. 1.03 KU 10/07/25 Optimization to work for any system combination 1.6 GM 11/11/25 Improved formatting and removed non-PARRETTO FMC. 1.6 GM 11/30/25 Used driver APIs to avoid direct register access. Moved DpRxSs_Setup() and other initializations to driver.
